title: Center_Reveal gradient + endSec + binding (L5/L8)
goal: Center_Reveal 15.24 dB. Two Gradient fills + Gaussian + 2 Image Masks + 6 colour Links. Also has its OWN endSec bug: animationEndSec=3.0s comes from 'Grad middle/ends' Position curves that saturate visually by ~0.567s but keep animating (value-plateau-past-visual-end, separate from media-fit padding). AND its A/B binding is swapped (shape-source mask falls through to wrong doc-order swap). Needs: (i) the precise single-masked-A/B-REVEAL discriminator that includes Center_Reveal but EXCLUDES Arrows/Vertigo; (ii) its own endSec fix. Build after the Wipes/Mask discriminator task. DoD: measurably up, 0 reg on Arrows/Vertigo/Slide.
